items.title: Wendy’s Stock Is Cheap, But Can the Turnaround Actually Work?
items.description: Wendy's is set up for a robust rebound, but investors are likely to feel more pain before it begins. Margin pressure points to dividend risk in 2026.

items.title: Builders FirstSource's Q4 Earnings & Sales Lag, Margins Down Y/Y
items.description: After a weak fourth quarter and softer 2025 results, can BLDR rebound as housing demand stabilizes?

items.title: McDonald's unveils 2026 menu as sales rebound
items.description: Some may call McDonald's cheap fast food, but one area the company has not skimped on is innovation. items.title: Zeus Packaging Group expands with KOEX Packaging purchase
items.description: Zeus said that the deal will increase production and logistics capacity within Europe and extend its presence into the US.

items.title: MCD and TXRH: 2 Low-Risk Restaurant Stocks With Upside
items.description: The restaurant sector has become highly competitive as consumers increasingly seek value, with McDonald's and Texas Roadhouse leading the way.
